title: prism - peach
description: a clean and vibrant pack to enhance your minecraft experience - now in 1.21! and recolored in peach!
body:
![prism thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea99f179606c70b48d491b660d6df4870b28b48f_0.webp)

it's finally here... prism 16x is now available for higher versions of minecraft!
___
### pack updates
updates to this pack will be made sparingly because i am actively working on other projects. i may consider future updates if the demand is there. please note that some textures will be missing for high version due to the sheer amount of minecraft updates that have been released since this pack's release
___
### notes
 [see original pack video (1.8.9)](https://youtu.be/37j4ga-ZlYU?si=ki7cW7inFjCRpHnO)

 this is the peach recolor of the prism 16x pack. to see different recolors, click [here](https://modrinth.com/collection/EX0tYYtW)
___
### disclaimers
this pack only supports skyboxes for optifine at the moment. there is no plan to add skyboxes for other mods at the moment.
___
### questions?
join my [discord server](https://discord.gg/FkqYUUu) if you run into any issues, have feedback/suggestions, or simply want to say hi!
